title: bernoullia jaliscana
intro: Bernoullia jaliscana, also known as the Mexican Copal Tree, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's bark, leaves, and seeds are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and have been shown to have antioxidant and cardiovascular benefits. Herbal preparations of Bernoullia jaliscana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
